name: ImmuneBuilder
description: Rapidly predict the structures of immune proteins, including antibodies (ABodyBuilder2), nanobodies (NanoBodyBuilder2), and T-Cell receptors (TCRBuilder2). Predicts CDR-H3 loops with an RMSD of 2.81Å, a 0.09Å improvement over AlphaFold-Multimer, while being over a hundred times faster.
capabilities: Rapidly predict the structures of immune proteins, including antibodies (ABodyBuilder2), nanobodies (NanoBodyBuilder2), and T-Cell receptors (TCRBuilder2)
Predicts CDR-H3 loops with an RMSD of 2.81Å, a 0.09Å improvement over AlphaFold-Multimer, while being over a hundred times faster

modelType.description: Type of immune protein to predict: antibodies, nanobodies, or T-cell receptors

heavySequence.description: Heavy chain (VH) sequence for antibodies, VHH sequence for nanobodies, or alpha chain for TCRs

lightSequence.description: Light chain (VL) sequence for antibodies, or beta chain for TCRs. Not required for nanobodies.
